case_title: ROSLER, DAN vs. WHALEN, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT WHALEN, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHALEN, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 706 KEARNY STREET #121, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-20-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT SHALL DISMISS RENT BOARD PETITION T990485 FORTHWITH.EACH BEARS OWN FEES AND COSTS.
